01 — about

About me.

I'm Nysa — a third-year engineering student at BITS Hyderabad who loves the process of building things: figuring out how they should work, making them actually work, and caring about the details along the way.

I like collaborating with people who are genuinely excited about what they're making. I find that the best outcomes come from listening well, asking the right questions, and not being precious about ideas.

Outside of work, I paint when I need to slow down and play badminton when I need to speed up. I think both have made me a better engineer.

Secure Asset Manager

Bank Transaction Anomaly Detector

A data analysis tool that surfaces unusual patterns in transaction behavior using statistical methods, with clean visualizations to make findings easy to interpret and act on.

Software Engineer Intern
